falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above its 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend reversal, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 (current score: 42) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme volatility or momentum, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal by suggesting a blowoff top rather than a bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day trading volume for the Nasdaq Composite falls below 50% of its 20-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a sharp decline in volume would indicate market participation collapse, contradicting the pattern's implied continuation and invalidating the 'HOLD' signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
